<item android:id="@+id/action_chat_members" <<<<<<< HEAD android:title="@string/chat_members" android:icon="@drawable/ic_people" ======= android:icon="@drawable/ic_people" android:title="@string/chat_members" >>>>>>> final app:showAsAction="never" />
